short_title: Endangered Species Act Procedural Reform Amendments of 1993
official_title: To reauthorize and amend the Endangered Species Act of 1973 to improve and protect the integrity of its programs for the conservation of threatened and endangered species, to ensure balanced consideration of all impacts of decisions implementing the Act, to provide for equitable treatment of non-Federal persons and Federal agencies under the Act, to encourage non-Federal persons to contribute voluntarily to species conservation, and for other purposes.
